description_long: This is a vintage Volkswagen Beetle car painted in a pastel blue and pink color scheme, featuring visible weathering, rust, and graffiti-style artwork on the doors and hood. The car is equipped with a roof rack carrying a colorful surfboard and a green suitcase, suggesting a beach or surf culture theme. The front of the car displays classic round headlights and a chrome bumper, while the rear has a distinctively curved trunk and a yellow-on-black license plate. The wheels are black with chrome hubcaps, and the windows are slightly tinted. The car's body shows signs of age and use, with visible scratches, dents, and faded paint. Decorative stickers and painted motifs, including a cartoonish character, add to its playful and personalized appearance.
description: A weathered, pastel blue and pink vintage Volkswagen Beetle with a surfboard and suitcase on the roof, decorated with graffiti and stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing round headlights, chrome bumper, surfboard and suitcase on the roof, and cartoon artwork on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the surfboard, suitcase, graffiti on the door, and visible rust and wear along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved trunk, license plate 'AKC 654', chrome bumper, and rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view with pink rear fender, graffiti text 'SURF OR DIE', and clear view of the roof rack and accessories.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual round headlights with chrome bezels
